找不到 Git 扩展，请确认 VSCode 已启用内置 Git 功能。: Git extension was not found. Make sure the built-in Git feature is enabled in VSCode.
当前工作区没有可用的 Git 仓库。: There is no available Git repository in the current workspace.
当前仓库没有检测到已更改的文件。: No changed files were detected in the current repository.
Calling AI to generate candidate commit messages...
Checking whether the current repository already has commit history...
No commit history was detected. Filling Initial commit automatically...
当前仓库还没有任何提交记录，已自动填入 Initial commit。: The current repository does not have any commit history. Initial commit has been filled in automatically.
未找到 {0}。请在设置中填写路径。: {0} was not found. Please fill in the path in Settings.
设置中的路径无效：{0}: The path in Settings is invalid: {0}
AI 工具没有返回 3 条候选 Commit Message。: The AI tool did not return 3 candidate commit messages.
AI 返回结果中的 {0} 必须是对象。: {0} in the AI response must be an object.
AI 返回结果中的 {0} 必须是字符串。: {0} in the AI response must be a string.
AI 返回结果中的第 {0} 条候选项包含未允许字段：{1}: Candidate {0} in the AI response contains disallowed fields: {1}
AI 返回结果中的第 {0} 条候选项标题长度不足。: The title of candidate {0} in the AI response is too short.
AI 返回结果中的第 {0} 条候选项描述长度不足。: The description of candidate {0} in the AI response is too short.
AI 返回结果包含未允许的顶层字段：{0}: The AI response contains disallowed top-level fields: {0}
AI 返回结果缺少 messages 数组。: The AI response is missing the messages array.
无法从 AI 输出中解析结果：{0}: Failed to parse the AI output: {0}
二进制文件，已跳过内容读取。: The file is binary. Content reading was skipped.
当前没有候选 Commit Message。点击源代码管理面板右上角的 AI生成: There are no candidate commit messages yet. Click the AI Generate button in the top-right corner of the Source Control panel to start.
生成 Commit Message 失败，请查看错误提示后重试。: Failed to generate commit messages. Review the error notification and try again.
API 服务配置不能为空。: The API service configuration cannot be empty.
API 服务配置不是合法 JSON。: The API service configuration is not valid JSON.
API 服务配置缺少 {0}。: The API service configuration is missing {0}.
API 服务返回了空结果。: The API service returned an empty result.
无法识别当前仓库的提交历史状态。: Failed to determine the commit history state of the current repository.
API 服务返回内容不是合法 JSON。: The API service response is not valid JSON.
API 服务配置中的 {0} 必须是 JSON 对象。: {0} in the API service configuration must be a JSON object.
API 服务配置中的 {0} 不能覆盖 {1} 字段。: {0} in the API service configuration cannot override the {1} field.
API 服务模式不支持 stream=true。请关闭流式输出后重试。: The API service mode does not support stream=true. Disable streaming output and try again.
API 地址必须是合法的 http 或 https 地址。: The API URL must be a valid http or https address.
API 密钥仍然是默认占位值，请先替换成真实密钥。: The API key is still the default placeholder. Replace it with a real key first.
API 请求超时，{0}ms 内没有收到响应。: The API request timed out. No response was received within {0}ms.
自定义路径必须指向 Codex、ClaudeCode 或 Gemini CLI: The custom path must point to an executable file of Codex, ClaudeCode, or Gemini CLI.
运行时语言已更新。若要让设置页语言也切换，请修改 VS Code 显示语言。: The runtime language has been updated. To change the Settings page language as well, change the VS Code display language.
当前所选 AI 工具没有可用的可执行文件路径。: The selected AI tool does not have an available executable path.
请打开设置，填写正确的工具路径后重试。: Open Settings, fill in the correct tool path, and try again.
当前所选 AI 工具路径无效，插件无法启动它。: The selected AI tool path is invalid, so the extension cannot start it.
请打开设置，修正工具路径后重试。: Open Settings, correct the tool path, and try again.
AI 服务配置无效，当前请求没有发出。: The AI service configuration is invalid, so the request was not sent.
请打开设置，修正 API地址、API密钥、模型ID 或自定义参数后重试。: Open Settings, fix the API URL, API key, model ID, or custom parameters, and try again.
响应 JSON Schema 配置无效，当前生成流程无法继续。: The Response JSON Schema configuration is invalid, so the generation flow cannot continue.
响应 JSON Schema 不能为空。: The Response JSON Schema cannot be empty.
响应 JSON Schema 不是合法 JSON。: The Response JSON Schema is not valid JSON.
响应 JSON Schema 必须是 JSON 对象。: The Response JSON Schema must be a JSON object.
响应 JSON Schema 的 type 必须是 object。: The type of the Response JSON Schema must be object.
响应 JSON Schema 必须要求 messages 字段。: The Response JSON Schema must require the messages field.
响应 JSON Schema 的 properties.messages.typ: The type of properties.messages in the Response JSON Schema must be array.
响应 JSON Schema 的 messages 数组长度必须固定为 3。: The messages array length in the Response JSON Schema must be fixed at 3.
响应 JSON Schema 的 properties.messages.ite: The type of properties.messages.items in the Response JSON Schema must be object.
响应 JSON Schema 的每个 messages 项都必须要求 title: Every messages item in the Response JSON Schema must require the title and description fields.
响应 JSON Schema 的 title.type 必须是 string。: The title.type in the Response JSON Schema must be string.
响应 JSON Schema 的 description.type 必须是 st: The description.type in the Response JSON Schema must be string.
响应 JSON Schema 中的 {0} 必须是对象。: {0} in the Response JSON Schema must be an object.
响应 JSON Schema 中的 {0} 必须是字符串数组。: {0} in the Response JSON Schema must be an array of strings.
响应 JSON Schema 中的 {0} 必须是非负整数。: {0} in the Response JSON Schema must be a non-negative integer.
请打开设置，修正响应 JSON Schema 后重试。: Open Settings, fix the Response JSON Schema, and try again.
本地 AI 工具执行失败。: The local AI tool failed to execute.
请检查工具是否已经完成登录、能否在终端中独立运行，以及路径配置是否正确。: Check whether the tool is signed in, can run independently in a terminal, and has the correct path configured.
AI 服务域名无法解析。: The AI service domain could not be resolved.
AI 服务拒绝了连接。: The AI service refused the connection.
与 AI 服务的连接被中断。: The connection to the AI service was interrupted.
连接 AI 服务超时。: The connection to the AI service timed out.
AI 服务的 TLS 证书校验失败。: TLS certificate validation failed for the AI service.
未能连接到 AI 服务。: Failed to connect to the AI service.
当前接口域名无法在本机解析，通常与地址填写错误、DNS 异常或网络限制有关。: The API domain cannot be resolved on this machine. This usually means the address is wrong, DNS is failing, or the network is restricted.
目标地址存在，但当前端口没有接受连接，通常与服务未启动、地址错误或本机被拦截有关: The target address exists, but the port is not accepting connections. This usually means the service is not running, the address is wrong, or the machine is blocked.
连接已经建立，但在传输阶段被对端或中间网络设备中断。: The connection was established but was interrupted during data transfer by the server or an intermediate network device.
请求长时间没有建立连接或收到响应，通常与网络阻塞、代理异常或服务端负载有关。: The request did not establish a connection or receive a response for a long time. This is usually related to network blocking, proxy issues, or server load.
当前 TLS 证书无法通过校验，通常与自签名证书、过期证书或中间证书链不完整有关: The current TLS certificate could not be validated. This is usually related to a self-signed certificate, an expired certificate, or an incomplete certificate chain.
这类问题通常来自网络连通性、代理配置、TLS 证书或目标服务本身。: This kind of problem usually comes from network connectivity, proxy configuration, TLS certificates, or the target service itself.
请检查 API 地址、网络、代理和证书环境后重试。: Check the API URL, network, proxy, and certificate environment, then try again.
AI 服务拒绝了当前请求参数。: The AI service rejected the current request parameters.
AI 服务拒绝了当前 API 密钥。: The AI service rejected the current API key.
当前 API 密钥没有访问这个接口或模型的权限。: The current API key does not have permission to access this endpoint or model.
AI 服务地址或模型不存在。: The AI service URL or model does not exist.
AI 服务请求超时。: The AI service request timed out.
AI 服务拒绝了当前请求频率或额度。: The AI service rejected the current request rate or quota.
AI 服务在处理请求时失败。: The AI service failed while processing the request.
AI 服务返回了失败响应。: The AI service returned a failure response.
请检查 API 地址、模型ID、自定义参数和 Prompt 内容是否符合当前服务: Check whether the API URL, model ID, custom parameters, and prompt content match the service requirements.
请检查 API 密钥是否填写正确，是否已经过期，是否匹配当前服务域名。: Check whether the API key is correct, expired, and matched to the current service domain.
请检查当前账号是否具备对应模型权限，或是否被服务端策略拒绝。: Check whether the current account has permission to use the model or is blocked by server-side policy.
请检查 API 地址路径和模型 ID 是否填写正确。: Check whether the API URL path and model ID are correct.
请稍后重试，并检查当前网络和目标服务状态。: Try again later and check the current network and target service status.
请检查当前额度、速率限制和并发限制，稍后再试。: Check the current quota, rate limits, and concurrency limits, then try again later.
这通常表示服务端异常、模型当前不可用，或当前请求触发了服务端内部错误。: This usually means the server is failing, the model is currently unavailable, or the request triggered an internal server error.
请结合服务端消息检查当前配置和请求内容。: Check the current configuration and request content together with the server message.
AI 服务已经返回数据，但返回内容不是插件可解析的 JSON。: The AI service returned data, but the content is not JSON that the extension can parse.
这通常表示当前接口返回了不兼容的格式，或自定义参数启用了插件不支持的流式输出。: This usually means the endpoint returned an incompatible format, or custom parameters enabled streaming output that the extension does not support.
请检查 API 地址、自定义参数和返回格式后重试。: Check the API URL, custom parameters, and response format, then try again.
AI 服务返回成功，但没有给出可用内容。: The AI service returned success, but it did not provide usable content.
请检查当前模型是否能稳定返回文本内容，并确认接口没有被自定义参数改成空响应模式。: Check whether the current model can reliably return text content and confirm the endpoint was not switched into an empty-response mode by custom parameters.
AI 已返回内容，但结果不符合插件要求的 JSON 结构。: The AI returned content, but the result does not match the JSON structure required by the extension.
请检查 Tool Response Prompt、响应 JSON Schema，: Check the Tool Response Prompt, the Response JSON Schema, and whether the current model reliably supports JSON output.
生成 Commit Message 时发生了未预期错误。: An unexpected error occurred while generating the commit message.
详细技术信息已写入日志，请先查看日志再处理。: Detailed technical information has been written to the log. Review the log first before taking further action.
未提供更多网络错误信息。: No additional network error information was provided.
